data.intro: Members fund our independent bookings, keep ticket prices affordable, and get first look at everything we do. Memberships are month-to-month and help us stay a nonprofit that books on merit rather than margin.

tiers.name: Friend
tiers.perks:
Early access to tickets
10% off at every bar
Members-only mixtapes
Quarterly print zine

tiers.name: Regular
tiers.perks:
Everything in Friend
Two free club entries per month
20% off at every bar
Plus-one privileges on any show
Merch discount

tiers.name: Patron
tiers.perks:
Everything in Regular
Unlimited club entry
Reserved table at Zone One
Invite to the annual programming dinner
Named in the quarterly program
One guest pass per month
